authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(b)(39) — Davis Creek (Goose Lake tributary) and tributaries (Modoc Co.)
sources.quotedText: (39) Davis Creek (Goose Lake tributary) and tributaries. (Modoc Co.). Sat. preceding Memorial Day through the last day in Feb. 5 trout

sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Streams (Mouth) layer record for gaz_id 259088, "Davis Creek", Stream, CA, Modoc Co.
sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":259088,"gaz_name":"Davis Creek","gaz_featureclass":"Stream","fcode":46000,"state_alpha":"CA","county_name":"Modoc","objectid_1":1411390,"isunknowncoords":2}, mouth point (Web Mercator -13399214.1911, 5121433.4921 → 41.73545°N, 120.36719°W). Confirms prior file coordinates (-120.3719, 41.7332), which sit ~460 m from the GNIS mouth point — well within tolerance, near the community of Davis Creek, CA just south of Goose Lake. (Note: a second, distinct GNIS-listed "Davis Creek" stream feature also exists in Modoc Co., gaz_id 259087, roughly 1.5 km away; the gaz_id 259088 mouth point is the closer match to this file's coordinates and to the Goose Lake tributary described in the regulation.)

sources.title: Goose Lake Redband Trout | California Trout
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

regulations.humanSummary: Open Saturday preceding Memorial Day through the last day of February
regulations.verbatimText: Sat. preceding Memorial Day through the last day in Feb.

parameters.counting_rule: Possession limit of 10 is the statewide default (twice the daily bag) per CCR §5.85; the special listing states only the 5-trout daily bag.

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
